title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 92.140 - Exemptions and deductions from tax may be authorized by city
text:
92.140.  Exemptions and deductions from tax may be authorized by city. — The municipal assembly of any such city may provide for deductions and exemptions from salaries, wages and commissions of employees and may provide for exemptions on account of the wives, husbands and dependents of such employees.
(Reenacted L. 1953 2d Ex. Sess. p. 14 § 2)
